name: Creation of Temporary File With Insecure Permissions
description: The product creates temporary files with overly permissive access controls (e.g., world-readable/writable), allowing unauthorized users to read sensitive data, modify file contents, or escalate privileges.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node creates temporary file in STORAGE using unsafe functions (tmpnam, tempnam, mktemp) without CONTROL node enforcing restrictive file permissions (0600) on the created file
